subject: Tall pale alien figure in a green bodysuit with elongated head, confident stance
description: A tall humanoid figure with pale, almost white skin stands in a composed posture. The head is elongated and smooth with no visible hair. The figure wears a form-fitting green bodysuit or uniform. The background is rendered in cool purples and whites suggesting an ethereal or magical environment. The posture is confident and slightly menacing, arms at sides, with a smug or neutral expression. The overall aesthetic matches a minor villain or henchman archetype.
foreground: Pale alien humanoid in green bodysuit, elongated head, upright stance
background: Purple and white ethereal swirl, magical atmosphere
emotion: smug confidence, mild menace, alien composure
